Dialog.name: MSG_RARE01_F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5072 0 0}Please wait a moment! The Shadow up ahead might be a...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RARE02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Well, now... That Shadow took off like a bandit, didn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Those ones are fairly rare... I suppose we can simply call them "rare Shadows."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}They can be tough to catch, but the potential rewards are worth the trouble.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RARE02_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}It seems to have turned left up ahead. Why don't you try tracking it down?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RARE02_F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Wow, it took off quickly, didn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I believe that's an unusual breed called a "rare Shadow."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}They're real fast on the run, but catching them apparently yields big rewards.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RARE02_02_F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}It looks like it made a left up ahead. Would you mind pursuing it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RARE03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}Is something the matter? Track down that rare Shadow before it gets away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RARE03_F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Please try tracking down that rare Shadow first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RARE04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}Ah, it seems to have escaped... I told you it'd be tough to catch, didn't I?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Well, the next time you see one, I want you to try engaging it in battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RARE04_F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5113 0 0}Oh, it got away... They really are fast, aren't they?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}If you see one again, try your best to catch up to it and fight it.[n]{f 1 1}
